case_title: LABORERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND vs. GRADEX CORP. A CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABORERES HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVED JUN-21-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRADEX CORP. A CORP.
